topics.name: 100 - 200 Level: FUTO Engineering Foundation & Geology
topics.description: ENG 101, ENG 201 Thermodynamics, Fluid Mechanics, Geology for Petroleum Engineers at FUTO.

subtopics.name: PET 201: Introduction to Petroleum Engineering & Geology (FUTO)
objectives: Understand origin of hydrocarbons, sedimentary basins, petroleum reservoir rocks, and fluid dynamics

topics.name: 300 - 500 Level: Reservoir, Drilling, Production, SIWES, and FUTO B.Eng. Project
topics.description: Reservoir Engineering, Drilling Hydraulics, Well Logging, Enhanced Oil Recovery, SIWES, and Thesis.

subtopics.name: PET 301 & PET 401: Drilling Technology, Reservoir Simulation, and Well Logging
objectives: Design rotary drilling bits, mud hydraulics, pressure control, and reservoir fluid phase behavior
Interpret wireline logs (Gamma Ray, Resistivity, Density, Neutron) for hydrocarbon pay zones

subtopics.name: PET 501 & PET 599: Production Engineering, Gas Technology, and B.Eng. Project
objectives: Design artificial lift systems (gas lift, ESP), natural gas processing, and defend FUTO B.Eng. thesis
